@startuml
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign center
participant "Client" as Client
participant "Oauth" as Oauth
box Login Endpoint #LightBlue2
    participant "" as LE1
end box
box Consent Endpoint #DarkSeaGreen3
    participant "" as CE1
end box


== Open page ==

activate Client 
note over Client : Initiate authorize code or implicit flow  
deactivate Client 

->>  Oauth   : No user session (not authenticated)   
<<-->> Oauth  

-->LE1: Redirect to login endpoint with <login_challenge>\n\nGET https://<LOGIN_ENDPOINT>/login?login_challange=7bb518c4eec2454dbb289f5fdb4c0ee2 


==Login==



 activate Client    
 note left of Client     : Input user/passwd     
 deactivate Client      
 -->CE1      : Verify user/password       
 <<---->CE1        
 <--+Oauth       : Fetch login request info with <login_challenge>\n GET http(s)://<OAUTH_ADMIN_URL>/oauth2/auth/requests/login?login_challenge=<challenge>         
 -->>-Oauth        {             
             PUT http(s):/<OAUTH_ADMIN_URL>/oauth2/auth/requests/login/accept?login_challenge=<challeng e >\n{ \ n\"acr\": \"string\",\n"context": {},\n"force_subject_identifier":" string",\n"remember ": true,\n" remember_for":3600 ,\n"s ubject ":" s tring"\n}            
         }          
 <- - +O auth          Accept logi n           
 return redirect url               
 ->>-Clien t            Redire ct               




 ===Consent===                 

 first time client asks permission                
 redir ect w ith cons ent challenge                 
 askin g users perm ission grant app access              
 fetch consent inf o                  
 get ht tp:/ /OA UT H_A DMIN_U RL/o aut h/r eqs/c onse nt ?con sen _cha lleng =chal lenge p ut htt ps // OA TH_ AD MI N UR L/a u th/re qu es ts/co ns en/ac cept co nsen ch al le ng=g ra nt_sc op=["ope nid","off line_ac ces"],ha ndled_at="2019-08-TI MESTAM P,sess ion={access_token:{foo:"field avail able introspecting Access Token"},id_to ken:{bar :"fiel d ava ilable claim ID Toke"}} accept ret urn r edirect ur l re direct pag e     

@enduml
